texto: I think for me, or for anyone who plays the quarterback position, it's almost an unspoken word when you think about leadership. Some guys can be a leader and be a running back or a lineman, or wide receiver, strong safety, or linebacker. But when you speak of quarterbacks, it's automatically a default that you're supposed to be a leader.
explicacao: Citação de Cam Newton sobre temas ligados a lideranca. “I think for me, or for anyone who plays the quarterback position, it's almost an unspoken word wh…” articula lideranca, leader, strong em registro de lideranca, com relevância para contextos como strong e safety.

texto: What happens when you take a lion out of the safari and try to take him to your place of residence and make him a house pet? It ain't going to happen. That's the type of person that I am. I'm that lion.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Cam Newton que provoca temas ligados a reflexao. Ao questionar “What happens when you take a lion out of the safari and try to take him to your place of residenc…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, i-am, lion, com foco em lion e you.

texto: I have unbelievable trust in my offensive line that they will get the job done. Not only them, but the running backs and as a quarterback, I have to do my job in getting the ball in the right people's hands and doing what I do best.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Cam Newton sobre temas ligados a motivacao. A afirmação “I have unbelievable trust in my offensive line that they will get the job done. Not only them, bu…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a motivacao, inspiracional, job, útil em momentos de inspiracao e job.
